name: Harvest Grape Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quinoa or long grained rice
1/4 cup Parsley, chopped OR 1/4 cup Cilantro, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse quinoa.
2. In a medium-sized saucepan over high heat, combine quinoa, broth and 1 cup water; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes, or until all water is absorbed.
4. Prepare Curry Vinaigrette.
5. Add 2 tbsp vinaigrette to cooked quinoa; toss to combine.
6. Cool to room temperature.
7. Toss cooled quinoa with remaining ingredients except romaine lettuce; refrigerate until serving time.
8. To serve, garnish salads with romaine lettuce or fill individual leaves of romaine with the quinoa mixture and drizzle with vinaigrette.
